english translation text: Dua “Allaahumma Inni  As-aluka Yaa Man Huwa Aqrabu - -” (Mafatul Jinan pg. 259)
In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ اِنّى اَسْاَلُكَ يا مَنْ هُوَ اَقْرَبُ اِلَىَّ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَريدِ
english translation text: O Allah I beseech Thee. O He who is nearer than my jugular vein.

arabic text: يا مَنْ يَحوُلُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
english translation text: O He who intervenes between the body and the soul.

arabic text: يا مَنْ هُوَ بِالْمَنْظَرِ الاَْعْلى وَبِالاُْفُقِ الْمُبينِ
english translation text: O He who is in the heavenly heights; and true horizons.

arabic text: يا مَنْ هُوَ الرَّحْمنُ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ اسْتَوى
english translation text: He who is Beneficent on the established A’rsh.

arabic text: يا مَنْ لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَىْءٌ وَهُوَ السَّميعُ الْبَصيرُ
english translation text: O He like unto whom there is nothing and He is Hearing, Seeing.

arabic text: اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّىَ عَلى مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: I ask Thee to send blessing on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad.
